changes.comment: Adds createLoopbackHub(), an in-memory DevTools hub plus the two client transports that connect to it: a socketFactory for the store agent and a WebSocket-compatible class for the panel UI. It speaks the real protocol (handshake, store-to-extension fan-out, command routing by storeId) with no server, ports, or extension, so the agent, hub, and panel can run in a single process (a browser tab or a test).
